name: Camille Rose Garcia
description: Camille Rose Garcia paints dark fairy tales — flooded wastelands, sad-eyed girls, and toxic-bright color palettes inspired by Disney animation and Cold War disaster films. Her work is a gothic remix of childhood innocence, channeling environmental dread and social anxiety through the visual language of cartoons. She illustrated a definitive edition of Alice's Adventures in Wonderland for HarperCollins.
